homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: Does this caption contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (best, completely related)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental techno track features a fast, pulsating synthesizer arrangement driven by digital drumming and electronic beats. The music maintains a youthful and energetic groove with a hypnotic, trance-like quality that creates a driving dance rhythm.

prompts.0: Does this caption contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (best, completely related)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment serves as a minimalist and ambient soundtrack where a slow piano melody is supported by strings to create a melancholic atmosphere. A ticking clock introduces a subtle sense of urgency, while the occasional camera shutter sound adds a layer of realism and intimacy. The piece avoids vocals entirely, focusing instead on these orchestral textures to evoke deep emotional reflection.

prompts.0: Does this caption contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (best, completely related)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment features an acapella choir performance where a lead vocalist sings in a smooth, legato style to create an ethereal and serene atmosphere. Without instrumental accompaniment, the group relies entirely on vocal harmony to establish a sense of continuity and unity throughout the piece. The dreamy quality of the music makes it well-suited for meditation or scenes depicting spiritual experiences.

questions.name: Sample 6
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This live performance captures an energetic rock cover driven by prominent electric guitar riffs and a catchy, driving rhythm. The track blends upbeat instrumentation with a nostalgic, slightly melancholic atmosphere that evokes a retro charm perfect for radio play. Recorded at Homers Bar & Grill in Austin, the piece balances infectious energy with warm, engaging dynamics typical of classic rock covers.

questions.name: Sample 7
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This electronic dance track features a male vocalist singing in a distinctive robotic voice over fast-paced drum machine rhythms. A driving synth bassline creates an energetic and urban atmosphere, making the piece well-suited for a club setting. The overall sound blends elements of house and pop with a fun, party-ready vibe characteristic of upbeat EDM.

A female vocalist sings in a higher pitch, enhancing the youthful vibe perfect for a dance party or lively gathering. The track maintains a catchy and infectious feel throughout its duration.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
